variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 162 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SAP1151AA03A0BP01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 162 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAP1151AA03A0BP01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 162 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
